recommendations.title: Children of the Corn
recommendations.overview: A traveling couple end up in an abandoned Nebraska town inhabited by a cult of murderous children who worship a demon that lives in the local cornfields.

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn
recommendations.overview: A traveling couple end up in an abandoned Nebraska town inhabited by a cult of murderous children who worship a demon that lives in the local cornfields.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn IV: The Gathering
recommendations.overview: A bright young medical student must solve the frightening mystery that plagues the children of a small Midwestern town.

recommendations.title: Silent Rage
recommendations.overview: A mentally ill man in a small Texas town goes on a killing rampage and is fatally wounded by police. When doctors use an experimental serum to bring him back to life, the killer develops superhuman strength and the town sheriff must pursue him.

recommendations.title: The Boy
recommendations.overview: An intimate portrait of a 9 year old sociopath as he discovers his taste for killing.

recommendations.title: Mean Dreams
recommendations.overview: When two youngsters meet and fall for each other, they must go on the run from the girl's corrupt father, who is also the sheriff of the town.

recommendations.title: The Return
recommendations.overview: Two young children and an adult in a small town have an encounter with an alien spaceship. 25 years later the children are reunited as adults in the same town which is now beset by strange cattle mutilations. Matters become worse when the cattle muti

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Who Can Kill a Child?
recommendations.overview: A couple of English tourists arrive at the island of Almanzora, off the Spanish Mediterranean coast, where they discover that there are no adults in a small fishing village, only some children who stare at them and smile mysteriously.
